input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.10.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: three shutdown buttons must be installed on the vehicle.

final_answer: Three Shutdown Buttons must be installed on the vehicle.
